title: CELEBRATE RECOVERY - 211info
text: ROLLING HILLS COMMUNITY CHURCH CELEBRATE RECOVERY Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides small group support for drug and alcohol addictions, sexual integrity, mental health concerns, codependency, anger, anxiety, depression, and various types of abuse. 3550 SW Borland Road Tualatin, OR 97062 Eligibility: Individuals in recovery or others needing coping support Hours: Thursday 6pm-8:30pm; optional dinner at 5:30pm Email (503) 638-5900 . Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (503) 638-5900 [email protected] Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Walk in, call, or visit website for more information FEES: None DOCUMENTS: None AREA SERVED: Washington County TRAVEL/LOCATION INFORMATION: Community resources are located on the lower level, east (left) side of the building. Services: General Addictions/Substance Use Disorder Support Groups Peer Mental Health Support Services Other Services Offered At This Location: FOOD - HOPE'S TABLE FOOD - WASH & WORSHIP MENTAL HEALTH ASSESSMENT AND TREATMENT - GRIEF RELEASE MUTUAL SUPPORT - DIVORCE CARE SOCIAL DEVELOPMENT AND ENRICHMENT - POP IN PLAY DATE If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. ROLLING HILLS COMMUNITY CHURCH
